title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
summary: IBM releases Granite Embedding Multilingual R2, an open-source (Apache 2.0) multilingual embedding model with 32K context length. It achieves state-of-the-art retrieval quality among sub-100M parameter models, supporting 12 languages. The model is optimized for RAG pipelines and enterprise search.
